# WillowSoft

WillowSoft is an embedded hardware and Industrial IoT engineering company. The canonical public website is https://willowsoft.co.

Important resources:

- Sitemap: https://willowsoft.co/sitemap.xml
- AI index: https://willowsoft.co/ai-index.json
- Products: https://willowsoft.co/en/products
- Services: https://willowsoft.co/en/services
- Solutions: https://willowsoft.co/en/solutions
- Company: https://willowsoft.co/en/company
- Contact: https://willowsoft.co/en/contact
- Start a project: https://willowsoft.co/en/start-project

WillowSoft designs connected products across hardware, firmware, RF/LoRaWAN, backend APIs, PostgreSQL, dashboards, mobile apps and VR simulation.

Last updated: 2026-06-12
